title: Lenticular, Depth, Slots, Springs & Morph
description: Cursor-driven lenticular reveal, frosted glass depth layers, slot-machine text roll, WAAPI spring entrances, morphing clip-path modal.

drops.title: Lenticular Cursor Reveal
drops.description: Vertical strips flip between two faces as the cursor sweeps — a CSS clip-path recreation of lenticular print technology.
drops.concept: Inspired by physical lenticular lenses, the canvas is divided into 22 vertical strips. As the cursor moves left-right, each strip independently toggles between face-A and face-B using CSS translateX, creating the illusion of a holographic flip. On touch devices, an auto-oscillating animation reproduces the same effect.

interaction.mouse: Move cursor left-right across the panel to flip strip faces
interaction.click: Selector buttons change the text pair

drops.title: Frosted Glass Depth Layers
drops.description: Four panels at distinct z-depths each with a different backdrop-filter blur, creating a spatial layout with genuine visual depth.
drops.concept: By varying backdrop-filter blur (32px / 20px / 8px / 2px), saturation, and brightness across 4 panels, each card feels like it sits at a different distance from the viewer. A parallax effect on mouse move reinforces the depth illusion. The animated gradient background highlights how blur amount changes color perception — foundational to Apple's 'liquid glass' design language.
drops.source: Apple visionOS / macOS backdrop-filter depth system

interaction.mouse: Move to apply parallax; hover cards to lift them
interaction.click: Cards have no click action — hover reveals depth

drops.title: Slot Machine Text Roll
drops.description: Characters scroll vertically like a mechanical slot machine with per-glyph stagger, spring easing, and auto-incrementing counter.
drops.concept: Each character slot is an overflow:hidden container holding a reel of all possible characters stacked vertically. Rolling to a target character animates translateY to position that character in the viewport — with a cubic-bezier spring that overshoots and settles. Stagger delay (index × 80ms) creates the cascade feel of a real slot machine. A separate 6-digit counter auto-increments every 1.2 seconds.

interaction.mouse: Type in the input field and press Enter or Roll
interaction.click: Roll / Random / Numbers buttons trigger animations
interaction.touch: Full touch support on input field

drops.title: WAAPI Spring Entrances
drops.description: Cards spring-bounce into view via Element.animate() with composite:accumulate — off-main-thread, staggered, with 4 swappable easing curves.
drops.concept: The Web Animations API runs animations off the main thread, ensuring jank-free 60fps even under heavy JS load. Using composite:'accumulate' allows multiple animations to stack without fighting each other. An IntersectionObserver fires each card's entrance when 15% enters the viewport. Four spring easing curves (spring, bounce, elastic, ease-out) can be compared live. Click cards to trigger a secondary pop animation chained with .then().

interaction.mouse: Scroll to trigger entrances; click cards for pop; click easing tracks to compare
interaction.click: Easing selector changes spring curve; Replay resets all cards

drops.title: Morphing Clip-Path Modal
drops.description: Buttons expand into a fullscreen modal via clip-path:circle() originating at the button — Material Design 3's container transform in vanilla CSS.
drops.concept: On button click, the modal overlay's clip-path animates from circle(0% at buttonX buttonY) to circle(150% at buttonX buttonY), creating a smooth expand from exactly where the user clicked. The reverse on close shrinks back to that origin. Content fades in with a 150ms delay to reveal cleanly inside the expanding circle. Keyboard (Escape) and backdrop click both close the modal. An auto-preview opens on page load.

interaction.mouse: Click any colored button; click backdrop or × to close
interaction.click: Each button opens a different modal with unique color scheme
interaction.touch: Full touch support; tap backdrop to close
